title: Fix m28-profiles-cache.test.js — cache expired fetch not triggering
description:
2 tests failing in test/m28-profiles-cache.test.js:

1. calls fetch when cache is older than 7 days — expect(global.fetch).toHaveBeenCalled() fails
2. updates cache timestamp after successful fetch — ENOENT /Users/kenefe/.agentic-service/profiles.json

The test sets up an expired cache (>7 days old) and expects getProfile() to call fetch to refresh. But fetch is never called, meaning the cache expiry check in profiles.js is not triggering a remote fetch.

Error log from latest-test.log:
  AssertionError: expected spy to be called at least once (line 37)
  ENOENT: profiles.json not written after getProfile() (line 44)

Fix: check profiles.js cache freshness logic — the 7-day expiry threshold may not be comparing timestamps correctly, or the fetch path is being short-circuited.
